description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a metallic body finished in a matte olive drab and black color scheme, suggesting a military or tactical application. The main body is constructed from metal with visible reinforcement plates and a prominent, squared-off barrel assembly. The stock is fixed and solid, providing stability for accurate firing, while the pistol grip and trigger guard are ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine and a rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The muzzle end is fitted with a device that appears to function as a flash hider or compensator, and the overall build is rugged, suitable for urban combat or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A rugged, metallic rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and matte olive drab and black finish, designed for tactical use. Features include a rail system, ergonomic grip, and a muzzle device for recoil or flash reduction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared-off barrel, muzzle device, and symmetrical stock fins.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, fixed stock, pistol grip, trigger guard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the stock and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the magazine and receiver.
